Lucas Premat.post_title: Where do you wish to live, now and in the future?
Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: I long for lattitude. Needs to be near the equator and sea

Lucas Premat.post_title: Where do you wish to live, now and in the future?
Lucas Premat.author: Jack Walford
Lucas Premat.text: Me too, Lucas. Equator and ocean is the dream.

Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: I know about them, but how do you integrate, can you give advice?

Lucas Premat.author: Jack Walford
Lucas Premat.text: What do you want, brother? . . . and by when?

Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: Interesting take: DIscipline the inner battle between your new identity and your old one.Anyone agree?

Lucas Premat.author: Dr. Stephen Buscema
Lucas Premat.text: Bang on, brother. You get it.

Lucas Premat.author: Lucas Premat
Lucas Premat.text: Perspective is anything.Identity is number one. Seeing things as easy and simplifying has helped me see things in a different way, allowing me to do my deepest, best work.

Scott Northwolf.author: Scott Northwolf
Scott Northwolf.title: We have our very own website now!
Scott Northwolf.body: 24d  • The Hero's Journey 🗺️We have our very own website now! I'm really happy to announce that today we built our very own website and we have two more new AMAZING acquisitions in our company, Answer 42.Here's the website, boys, check it out:https://answer42.llc/

Scott Northwolf.post_title: We have our very own website now!
Scott Northwolf.author: Jack Walford
Scott Northwolf.text: You're unstoppable, king! Gonna travel to Bali and Germany nexxt year next year, and then even the Himalayas for that Power-Up footage, so I am constantly traveling around for new adventures acquiring more and more lessons and wisdom. Skool and Answer 42 was 7 months ago literally, it was end of november, with so many lessons inbetween . . . and it hasn't even been a year brother and look how much you grow. . . it's exactly what you said to me one day . . . even the opposite side of your arm is too far and too big of a gap compared to where you want to be . . . it's exactly that, I feel like there are so many bigger and higher levels out there that still need to be unlocked and traversed and that's exactly why I think we've found this journey, it's what we always look for . . . whatever happens we always look for how we can spread ans share everything we discover with that collective, because there's so many lesson and shortcuts that society doesn't want us to know, because it cornflicks with their own hidden interests and this is why communities like The Answer 42 will always exist. . . I want to say I'm glad that my path to self-improvement started in this group, brother, it's not just that the community is relatively small, but it's also personal, very sincere and honest, it allows every person to be who they truly are and who they want to develop into, that's why we love it

Scott Northwolf.author: Scott Northwolf
Scott Northwolf.text: Scott Northwolf • Feb 2@Life Coach Rob money is made when value is created and value is created when pain is alliviated.

As my niche and ICP is very well sniped in, and i had an epic lead book from that first week testing ads at 11bucks daily... The past 10 days has generated none, but playing with video now. Figured continuing

Andreas Leijonmarck.author: Jack Walford
Andreas Leijonmarck.text: Keep us posted about your progress!

Lea Newkirk.author: Lea Newkirk
Lea Newkirk.title: Who are you, really?
Lea Newkirk.body: 12d  • General 💭Who are you, really?It’s wild to realize that so many of the things we call "just who I am" are actually just habits we built to feel safe once upon a time. We spend so much energy trying to fix the person we think we are, but maybe the real work is just letting go of the patterns that don't serve the person we’re becoming.

Lea Newkirk.author: Jack Walford
Lea Newkirk.text: What you said really hit home. Painful, necessary, but somewhat beautifully so things.

Lea Newkirk.author: Lea Newkirk
Lea Newkirk.text: Leijonmarck heavily feel you on the socializing part, on that topic, how do you end up finding a balance?

Lea Newkirk.author: Jack Walford
Lea Newkirk.text: Haha, Andreas, are you actually asking me about balance??! lol

Benjamin S..author: Benjamin S.
Benjamin S..title: KPI Tracker
Benjamin S..body: Mar 21  • Money 💰KPI TrackerHey guys, I made this cool KPI Tracker based on what  was being teaching and based on his latest post about setting goals.It has a revenue planner in it, so all you have to do is simply type in your stats based on calls that you've had, and it will tell you exactly how many outreach per day you need in order to achieve your goal.I made it with Claude AI and you can do the same.I will leave both the file and prompt in case if you want to modify for your own needs.isla

Benjamin S..text: Best quote in document, no question.
